entry.title: New: GREAT-5(1) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
INITIAL CASE ASSESSMENT, LITIGATION COSTS ASSESSMENT, AND SETTLEMENT OPTIONS FROM SPECIAL COUNSEL UNDER RESOLUTION 25-109, CD1, REGARDING ALLEGATIONS MADE BY LEO CAIRES, A FORMER COUNTY OF MAUI EMPLOYEE (GREAT-5(1))

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
